Skystrikers is one of my favorites that I’ve picked up in 2024. I really like how different and unique each class is, and how beginner friendly it is to try, especially with Jetstream not needing you to flail your arms around as much. Both casual and competitive play feels intense and really fun. The designs of your surroundings and other people look really good too. If you’re familiar at all with Gorilla Tag, you’ll love this game. 5/5, would skystrike again.

We want to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. There, you can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
Sky strikers is by far the best free vr game i have tried. The mechanics of the characters combined with the gorilla tag like movement made for smooth gameplay. My only reccomendation is to create more character but aside from that the game was a lot of fun.
The fact that they managed to combine gorimma tag movement with different abilities surprised me.
5 stars, will be playing in the future.

There, you can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
so I find this game pretty decent the colors and characters pop on this game very well, but the snap turning is kind of sickening to try and make your way around the game, even when walking around the lobby, smooth turn feature would be nice especially having a quick menu button so I can navigate and adjust my controls mid game or when I'm not in the middle of the lobby. 
as for gameplay, I already see a lot of experts better than me lol, but i cannot wait to see improvements for the game to make it a lot more easier for people like me that feels the same. 
(also note, need a lot of space in your room in order to play this game more properly no problem, I live in an attic so makes it difficult to get the full experience lol)

developer_response.body: Hi Yoshi, thank you so much for leaving the review! The two issues you brought up, smooth turning and hand menu, are all being worked on right now and will be available very soon in future updates. A better tutorial will also be added, but I have to say the best way to improve your skills is to grind and get some tips from our experts. Both in game or in the Discord server, they are usually very friendly to talk too! We want to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. There, you can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

So the main game mode is basically a mixture of rocket league with gorilla tag, where 2 teams compete to score the most goals, while traversing using your hands mainly. Other classes can either fly or create a huge wall, so you can have either a striker or a goalie. The few times I've played the game, the playerbase seems to be on the younger side.

developer_response.body: Hi jimmito, thank you for leaving the review! Yes, the combination of the two games is definitely the vibe we were going for. We also incorporated different game modes and rank match play to grow an identity of our own. But we appreciate the review!

developer_response.body: Hellow realMonkeyVR, thank you for the reply. Although we think Orion Drift is a great game, SkyStrikers has been out for almost two years! Hope you enjoy your time in the game.

reviews.review_description:
Just as a warning to anyone THIS IS A GORILLA TAG LOCOMOTION GAME, IF YOU'VE NEVER PLAYED ONE, IT HAS A STEEP LEARNING CURVE.
With that out of the way, this is a very nice take on gorilla tag fangames, it mixes the semi-intuitive movement with sports. it is a very nice concept, and you can tell the developers put care into this.

I really like the class system, 3 different ways to play, some more confusing than others but all seem balanced.
I really like the art style of this game, its pleasant and new.
I like the arena shape, it's basically just an open oval with floating bits in it to bounce off of, it makes more sense in-game.

However, I felt the tutorial was a little lacking, it's a very small little room that just tells you the controls, and nothing else. at first, I especially got confused about the lobby, and was not aware there was more than one gamemode.
Also, the flying class feels very out of control and confusing, it basically just gives you low gravity and a very light jetpack that can let you change your path in air, except it felt very underpowered and as if I was just blowing outwards the opposite direction I wanted to go
I also didn't like how some gamemode options can shut out classes, as also most of the time it forced you into the flying one, which was the most confusing.

I would like to recognize that, of writing this, the game is in an early access, and these problems will probably get better with future updates.
as a final warning to anyone older! this game is full of very squealy children! some of them are fine, one helped me with a few things and taught me pretty much how to navigate the lobby, but some of them are loud. Just a warning

developer_response.body: Hi arcanum, thank you so much for leaving the detail review, we really appreciated. It looks like you spend some time in the street arena, where it's mean for casual play and practice. If you make your way to the Hall of Heroes across the arena, you will be able to join Rank Matches. Which is much more competitive with set maps and more skill players. However, we are aware of the problem with our tutorial and since our launch, we have improved the it and added a practice gym to help players get familiarized with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_title: If you like gorilla tag and sports
reviews.review_description: The game starts with a short tutorial that covers the basics but does not explain the different classes well. after that you get dropped directly into a lobby which is where you access everything and is also where the game is played. This means you might end up in a full lobby with almost no one playing. The gorilla tag movement is very slow, if you don't play gorilla tag it is very hard to chase the ball. all the settings are on a board in the lobby which makes it annoying to change anything or mute people and the settings are very minimal mostly toggles for either on or off. if you play gorilla tag and want to try a sports version this is the game for you otherwise I would avoid.

developer_response.body: Hi lavuy, thank you so much for leaving the review. We have now improved the tutorial and added a practice gym to help players get familiarized with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. The arena in the hub is designed for minigames and practice. The competitive rank match with matchmaking is in the Hall of Heroes, located across the street from the street arena. A menu option that you can call out anytime to change settings and mute players is also something we plan to add in the future. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Another free to play game that's more geared towards new users. Controls are based around the trend of gorilla tag style movement, which are more responsive than most I have tried. Game itself is a basic back and forth sport game with various goals depending on the mode. Overall a simple and easy game to figure out after a few minutes. The thing to be wary of is that like most free to play games you will encounter younger players who are a mixed bag of interactions.

developer_response.body: Hi Gillman, thank you so much for leaving the review. It sounds like you experienced our street area, which is designed to offer casual gameplay and fun game modes. I highly recommend you try out the rank matches in the Hall of Heroes. It provides a much more competitive gameplay experience that requires teamwork and skills. Since our launch, we have improved the tutorial and added a practice gym to help players familiarize themselves with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
The Gorilla Tag style controls employed in this game present significant challenges to the user experience. The controls are intricate and unreliable, leading to frequent instances of the player becoming stuck in walls or encountering other frustrating situations that could be avoided with analogue stick movement.

Furthermore, this control scheme lacks accessibility for individuals with mobility impairments or limited VR spaces.

As a result, I can not recommend this game to individuals who dislike the GTag movement style.

Despite these drawbacks, the game's graphics and art style are commendable, and the underlying concept is intriguing. However, due to the aforementioned control issues, which severely hinder gameplay, I am unable to provide a rating higher than 2 stars.

developer_response.body: Hi SenseMakesNone, thank you so much for leaving the review. We have now improved the tutorial and added a practice gym to help players get familiarized with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. There are other class options such as Jetstream which moves away from the gtag movement and lets you fly in the game. However, the interactive control against the environment is a core gameplay experience, so we understand it is not for everyone. We really appreciate you trying the game out, and hope you can come back and check out Jetstream when you can :) We'd like to also invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
I've spent, like, two hours playing this game, and from the very beginning, it seemed like a lot of love and attention to detail was put into its creation. The colors really pop.

As for gameplay, it is fast-paced and fun. I can already see how this is going to hook players who enjoy skill-based action games. I tested all three classes out, due to my own skill issues, I really stuck with Jetstream. It seemed to have the smoothest learning curve when it came to movement and didn't require quite so much finesse to get the basics down; a godsend for the casual player lol.

Once I got a grip on things, I started really enjoying the competitive aspect of it. I can even score goals left and right! Well, okay, I scored one goal in 13 matches, but who's counting, right? (spoiler alert-I am and I'm pretty proud of that goal!) That being said, the game does have a learning curve, but even when I wasn't winning, I didn't feel discouraged. The gameplay has that "just one more round" kind of vibe, which is always good in my opinion.

Aside from the actual matches, I enjoyed the social aspect the developers are incorporating. There's this neat little hangout at the top where you can chill with friends-or soon-to-be friends if you're feeling social. It's really nice to include this in the experience, giving players an area to connect between matches or strategize for the next round. I could definitely see this area being used as a hub for future events or casual conversations.

All in all, this is a great start for an early access game. There is so much potential here, and I'm excited to see what's coming next!

developer_response.body: Hi Haroku, thank you so much for leaving the detail review, and we are also very proud of the goal you score. But also remember goal is not everything in this game, defense is important as well. I also recommend you to check out the rank matches in the Hall of Hereos for a more competitive game play experience. Since our launch, we have improved the tutorial and added a practice gym to help players get familiarized with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: This game has good movement similar to gorilla tag and the classes are easy to learn which is great since the game is intended for younger audiences. The colors are very appealing and easily draw young players attention. I do hope more classes are added to the game that can make it a little bit more fast paced which would make the game a lit more action packed. I feel like this game is great considering it is in early access and might have more features in the future. I think this game has good potential as a casual game for kids.

A map has also been added to help players navigate. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
The concept at the heart of this game is pretty good, featuring a class system that makes way for two pretty different gameplay styles, and a quick and responsive movement system. Unfortunately, upon entering a server you'll realize that the lobby implementation just doesn't work that well: the place where the actual games are played is often empty and the few players that are there can quickly switch teams or leave the game at any moment, making it really hard to play a full game.
EDIT: there IS a ranked mode, which forces players to commit to the game once it starts, but I haven't been able to find any matches on it, despite having searched for quite a bit.

developer_response.body: Hi gaming Topoxx, thank you so much for leaving the review. We are very happy to hear that you were able to find where to start searching for Rank Matches. With more players in the server now, you should be able to find a rank match in a much shorter time. We have now improved the tutorial and added a practice gym to help players get familiarized with the gameplay. A map has also been added to help players navigate. We'd like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/skystrikers]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

Download. Now. Pease 🫛

Love this game and everything it stands for!

Been playing since like old old sky strikers, back in my day! Levels and different bats didn’t exist! Just hit ball in goal! And shoot rocket go boom!

Ever since they got their first big map update I’ve been kinda invested lol (talking about dome, current map)

reviews.review_description:
SCAMMER! I BUY 1000 FOR $9.99 AND IT SAID THAT I WILL GET A 950+50 BONUS BUT I DIDN'T I HAD TO BUY IT TWICE THIS IS $19.99 THIS GAME IS A CASH GRAB! IT'S STILL FUN BUT IT TAKES 20 MINUTES JUST TO GET INTO A CUSTOM MATCH I CAN'T TRAIN NEW PLAYER IF THEY BECOME THE GAME MASTER. AND THE PEOPLE THAT DON'T KNOW WHAT THE WORD "LEAVE" IS! IF GAMES CAN LOAD YOU INTO A LOBBY IN 5 SECONDS THIS GAME MAKES YOU WAIT MORE! I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS GAME UNLESS YOU ARE SEARCHING FOR EXERCISE. fix all of this PLEASE the game is good with passing the time but...
IT NEVER GETS UPDATED! fix it.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we are sorry to hear that you have experienced this issue. It looks like there is a misunderstanding in the text. As it means for $9.99 you will get 950JC plus a bonus of 50JC, so that's a total of 1000JC. If you would like to have a refund, please reach out to us by email at [support@chamber-8.com] or you can join our Discord and reach out to the Admin or developer. More in-game discussions and questions can also be answered there. Here is the Discord link:[https://discord.gg/sky-strikers-1070942525201842216]. 

As for the new update, we are releasing a new update this week, so please stay tuned for that. 

We really appreciate your feedback, and our devs have been working very hard to provide this game for free, with regular updates. So please keep that in mind and try to reach out to us to resolve the problem before leaving a negative review, thank you.

reviews.review_title: I used to have a five star review
reviews.review_description: I used to be level fifty at the game, then the update happened. They add anime boys and pay to win classes getting rid of the fun fair play style.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you so much for leaving the review. We are sorry to hear that you have changed your view on the game. We understand that the new update can take some time to get used to, but it also seems like there is a misunderstanding here. 

All the new classes we added are completely free; everyone has access to all three classes. The items available for purchase with in-game currency (Coins or JCs) are purely cosmetic and do not provide any competitive advantage. Fair play is something we prioritize highly, and we have no plans to introduce store items that enhance in-game abilities. Every match will continue to be determined by player skill and experience.

If you have further questions, we would like to invite you to join our Discord server if you haven't done so, at [https://discord.gg/sky-strikers-1070942525201842216]. You can discuss the game with other players, report bugs or give suggestions, look for team-ups, and chat with the devs there. You can also contact us by email at [support@chamber-8.com]. Have fun!

The game master role has been removed. If you go in the Hall of Heroes you can join ranked matchmaking and participate in competitive 3v3 matches.

The Sky Strikers Dev Team
